member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Events.DomainEvent
member.summary: Base record for all domain events. Automatically assigns a new and sets to the current UTC time.

example.code: public record OrderCreatedEvent(Guid OrderId, Guid TenantId) : DomainEvent;

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent
member.summary: Marker interface for domain events. Domain events represent something meaningful that happened in the domain. They are raised inside aggregate roots and dispatched after SaveChangesAsync commits successfully.
member.remarks: CCA keeps this interface free of MediatR dependencies to preserve the zero-dependency rule of CCA.Core.Domain. The dispatcher in CCA.Core.Persistence wraps domain events into MediatR notifications before dispatching.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this domain event instance.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent.OccurredOn
member.summary: Gets the UTC date and time when this event occurred.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PagedResponse`1
member.summary: Represents a paginated response returned to the client. Contains the current page of items and metadata about the full result set.
member.typeparam: The type of items in this page.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PagedResponse`1.Items
member.summary: Gets or sets the items on the current page.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PagedResponse`1.PageIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the current page.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PagedResponse`1.PageSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of items per page.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PagedResponse`1.TotalCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of records across all pages.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PagedResponse`1.TotalPages
member.summary: Gets the total number of pages based on and .

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PagedResponse`1.HasPrevious
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a previous page exists.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PagedResponse`1.HasNext
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a next page exists.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PagedResponse`1.Create(System.Collections.Generic.IList{`0},System.Int32,CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PageRequest)
member.summary: Creates a from a list of items, a total count, and the original page request.
member.param: The items on the current page.
The total number of records across all pages.
member.returns: A populated .

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PageRequest
member.summary: Represents pagination and sorting parameters sent by the client. Passed to repository methods and query handlers to control which page of data is returned.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PageRequest.PageIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based page index. Page 0 is the first page. Defaults to 0.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PageRequest.PageSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of items per page. Defaults to 10.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PageRequest.SortBy
member.summary: Gets or sets the field name to sort by. null means no explicit sorting is applied.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PageRequest.SortDescending
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the sort direction is descending. false (ascending) by default.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Pagination.PageRequest.Skip
member.summary: Gets the number of records to skip, computed from and . Used directly in SQL OFFSET clauses.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.AggregateRoot`1
member.summary: Base class for DDD aggregate roots that are not tenant-scoped. Extends with domain event support.
member.remarks: Use this base class for global aggregate roots (not scoped to any tenant). For tenant-scoped aggregate roots, use .
member.typeparam: The type of the aggregate root identifier.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.AggregateRoot`1.RaiseDomainEvent(CCA.Core.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Adds a domain event to the list of pending events. Events are dispatched after SaveChangesAsync commits.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity`1
member.summary: Base class for all domain entities. Provides identity-based equality — two entities with the same are considered equal regardless of reference.
member.remarks: In DDD, entity identity is determined by the Id, not by memory address. This class enforces that rule through overridden Equals, GetHashCode, and equality operators.
member.typeparam: The type of the entity identifier.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity`1.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier of this entity.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity`1.CreatedDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC date and time when this entity was created. Set automatically by the EF Core interceptor on insert.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity`1.UpdatedDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC date and time when this entity was last updated. Set automatically by the EF Core interceptor on update.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity`1.DeletedDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC date and time when this entity was soft-deleted. Null means the entity is not deleted.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity`1.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether this entity equals another object. Two entities are equal if they are of the same type and have the same .
member.returns: true if the objects are equal; otherwise false.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity`1.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns the hash code for this entity based on its . Required when is overridden — ensures entities work correctly in dictionaries and hash sets.
member.returns: A hash code for the current entity.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity`1.op_Equality(CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity{`0},CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity{`0})
member.summary: Determines whether two entities are equal using identity-based comparison.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity`1.op_Inequality(CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity{`0},CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity{`0})
member.summary: Determines whether two entities are not equal using identity-based comparison.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Guard
member.summary: Provides static guard methods for validating method arguments. Replaces external libraries (e.g. Ardalis.GuardClauses) to keep CCA.Core.Domain free of NuGet dependencies.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Guard.NullOrWhiteSpace(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if the value is null or whitespace.
member.param: The name of the parameter being validated.
member.returns: The original value if validation passes.
member.exception: Thrown when is null, empty, or whitespace.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Guard.Null``1(``0,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if the value is null.
member.typeparam: The type of the value being validated.
member.param: The name of the parameter being validated.
member.returns: The original value if validation passes.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Guard.NegativeOrZero(System.Decimal,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if the decimal value is negative or zero.
member.param: The name of the parameter being validated.
member.returns: The original value if validation passes.
member.exception: Thrown when is less than or equal to zero.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Guard.NegativeOrZero(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if the integer value is negative or zero.
member.param: The name of the parameter being validated.
member.returns: The original value if validation passes.
member.exception: Thrown when is less than or equal to zero.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Guard.EmptyGuid(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if the Guid value is empty.
member.param: The name of the parameter being validated.
member.returns: The original value if validation passes.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.Guard.OutOfRange(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if the value is outside the specified inclusive range.
member.param: The name of the parameter being validated.
member.returns: The original value if validation passes.
member.exception: Thrown when is less than or greater than .

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.TenantAggregateRoot`1
member.summary: Base class for tenant-scoped DDD aggregate roots. Combines with support.
member.remarks:
This is the most common base class for top-level domain concepts in multi-tenant applications built on CCA. Examples: Order, Invoice, Product.
Use for global aggregates (not tenant-scoped). Use for inner entities that live inside an aggregate.
member.typeparam: The type of the aggregate root identifier.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.TenantEntity`1
member.summary: Base class for tenant-scoped domain entities that do not raise domain events. Extends with support.
member.remarks:
Use this base class for entities that:
Belong to a specific tenant
Do not raise domain events
Live inside an aggregate (not an aggregate root themselves)
For entities that raise domain events, use . For global (non-tenant) entities, use .
member.typeparam: The type of the entity identifier.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IAggregateRoot
member.summary: Marks an entity as a DDD aggregate root. Aggregate roots are the only entry point to their aggregate cluster. They raise domain events that are dispatched after the transaction commits.
member.remarks: Only aggregate roots have repositories. Inner entities of an aggregate are accessed exclusively through the aggregate root.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IAggregateRoot.DomainEvents
member.summary: Gets the list of domain events raised by this aggregate root since the last time they were cleared.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IAggregateRoot.ClearDomainEvents
member.summary: Clears all domain events from this aggregate root. Called by the dispatcher after events have been published.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IAuditableEntity
member.summary: Marks an entity as auditable. The EF Core interceptor automatically sets and from ICurrentUser on every save.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IAuditableEntity.CreatedBy
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the user who created this entity. Set automatically on insert.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IAuditableEntity.UpdatedBy
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the user who last updated this entity. Set automatically on update.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IEntity`1
member.summary: Defines the base contract for all entities in the domain. Every entity has a strongly-typed identifier.
member.typeparam: The type of the entity identifier.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IEntity`1.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this entity.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IMultiTenant
member.summary: Marks an entity as tenant-aware. The EF Core global query filter automatically scopes all queries to the current tenant by adding WHERE TenantId = @currentTenantId. The EF Core interceptor automatically sets from ICurrentUser on insert.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IMultiTenant.TenantId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the tenant this entity belongs to. null means the entity is global (not tenant-scoped).

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IRecalculable
member.summary: Defines a contract for entities that have computed fields derived from their child collections or other properties. Forces the entity to own its own recalculation logic.
member.remarks: Entities implementing this interface call inside every mutating method that affects the computed fields. Handlers never calculate totals, aggregates, or derived values directly. This pattern was adopted from the EFisher production project.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IRecalculable.Recalculate
member.summary: Recomputes all derived fields from the current state of the entity. Called internally after any mutation that affects computed values.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.ISoftDeletable
member.summary: Marks an entity as soft-deletable. Soft-deleted entities are never physically removed from the database. The EF Core global query filter automatically excludes them from all queries by adding WHERE DeletedAt IS NULL.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.ISoftDeletable.DeletedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC date and time when this entity was soft-deleted. null means the entity is active and not deleted.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.ISoftDeletable.DeletedByUserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the user who deleted this entity.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.ISoftDeletable.IsDeleted
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this entity has been soft-deleted.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IStateMachine`1
member.summary: Defines a contract for entities that have a lifecycle status with valid state transitions. Forces the entity to own its own state machine logic.
member.remarks: Transition validation lives inside the entity — handlers never check if (entity.Status == X) directly. They call or a domain method that uses it internally.
member.typeparam: The enum or type representing the entity status.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IStateMachine`1.Status
member.summary: Gets the current status of this entity.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Primitives.IStateMachine`1.CanTransitionTo(`0)
member.summary: Determines whether a transition to the specified status is valid from the current status.
member.param: The target status to transition to.
member.returns: true if the transition is valid; otherwise false.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Error
member.summary: Represents a structured domain error with a code and a message. Used as the failure value in and .
member.remarks: Error codes follow the convention EntityName.ErrorType, for example User.NotFound or Order.AlreadyShipped. Controllers use the code suffix to determine the HTTP status code automatically: codes ending in .NotFound map to 404, .Forbidden to 403, etc.
member.param: A human-readable description of the error.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Error.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a structured domain error with a code and a message. Used as the failure value in and .
member.remarks: Error codes follow the convention EntityName.ErrorType, for example User.NotFound or Order.AlreadyShipped. Controllers use the code suffix to determine the HTTP status code automatically: codes ending in .NotFound map to 404, .Forbidden to 403, etc.
member.param: A human-readable description of the error.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Error.Code
member.summary: A unique machine-readable error identifier.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Error.Message
member.summary: A human-readable description of the error.

member.name: F:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Error.None
member.summary: Represents the absence of an error. Used as the error value for successful results.

member.name: F:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Error.NullValue
member.summary: Represents an error caused by a null value being provided where one is not allowed.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result
member.summary: Represents the outcome of an operation that can either succeed or fail. Used instead of throwing exceptions for expected business failures.
member.remarks:
Always use or factory methods to create instances. Direct construction is not allowed.
For operations that return a value on success, use .

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result.#ctor(System.Boolean,CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Error)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The error if the operation failed.
member.exception: Thrown if a success result has a non-empty error, or if a failure result has an empty error.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the operation succeeded.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result.IsFailure
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the operation failed.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result.Error
member.summary: Gets the error associated with a failed result. Returns for successful results.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result.Success
member.summary: Creates a successful result with no value.
member.returns: A successful .

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result.Failure(CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Error)
member.summary: Creates a failed result with the specified error.
member.returns: A failed .

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result.Success``1(``0)
member.summary: Creates a successful result carrying a value.
member.typeparam: The type of the success value.
member.param: The value to carry on success.
member.returns: A successful .

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result.Failure``1(CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Error)
member.summary: Creates a failed result of the specified value type.
member.typeparam: The type of the success value.
member.returns: A failed .

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result`1
member.summary: Represents the outcome of an operation that returns a value on success. On success, contains the result. On failure, describes what went wrong.
member.typeparam: The type of the value returned on success.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result`1.#ctor(`0,System.Boolean,CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Error)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The error if the operation failed.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result`1.Value
member.summary: Gets the value of a successful result.
member.exception: Thrown when accessed on a failed result. Always check before accessing this property.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result`1.op_Implicit(`0)~CCA.Core.Domain.Results.Result{`0}
member.summary: Implicitly converts a value to a successful . Allows returning a value directly from methods that return Result<T>.
member.param: The value to wrap in a successful result.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money
member.summary: Represents a monetary amount with an ISO 4217 currency code. Immutable value object — all operations return a new instance.
member.remarks:
Decimal places are automatically determined by the currency code:
0 decimal places: JPY, KRW, VND, BIF, GNF
3 decimal places: KWD, BHD, OMR, TND
2 decimal places: all others (USD, EUR, TRY, GBP, etc.)
Arithmetic across different currencies is not allowed and throws .

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.Amount
member.summary: Gets the monetary amount, rounded to the correct decimal places for the currency.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.CurrencyCode
member.summary: Gets the ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. "USD", "EUR", "TRY"). Always stored in uppercase.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.Of(System.Decimal,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance with the specified amount and currency.
member.returns: A new instance.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.Zero(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a zero-amount instance for the specified currency.
member.returns: A new instance with zero amount.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.Add(CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money)
member.summary: Adds another amount to this instance. Both amounts must have the same currency.
member.returns: A new instance with the combined amount.
member.exception: Thrown when the currencies do not match.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.Subtract(CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money)
member.summary: Subtracts another amount from this instance. Both amounts must have the same currency.
member.returns: A new instance with the reduced amount.
member.exception: Thrown when the currencies do not match.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.Multiply(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Multiplies this amount by the specified factor.
member.returns: A new instance with the multiplied amount.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.ApplyDiscount(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Applies a percentage discount to this amount.
member.returns: A new instance with the discounted amount.
member.exception: Thrown when is not between 0 and 100.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.IsZero
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this amount is zero.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.IsPositive
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this amount is greater than zero.

member.name: P:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.IsNegative
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this amount is less than zero.

member.name: T:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.ValueObject
member.summary: Base class for DDD value objects. Value objects have no identity — two instances with the same property values are considered equal.
member.remarks: Implement to define which properties participate in equality comparison. Value objects should be immutable — all properties set in the constructor only.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.ValueObject.GetEqualityComponents
member.summary: Returns the components used to determine equality for this value object. Each yielded value participates in the equality and hash code calculation.
member.returns: The equality components of this value object.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.ValueObject.op_Equality(CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.ValueObject,CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.ValueObject)
member.summary: Determines whether two value objects are equal by value.

member.name: M:CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.ValueObject.op_Inequality(CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.ValueObject,CCA.Core.Domain.ValueObjects.ValueObject)
member.summary: Determines whether two value objects are not equal by value.
